name: clodex
description: Autonomous development loop: plan, ship, run codex adversarial-review, and iterate on findings until approved or threshold/iteration cap is reached. v0.2.9 lifts --version and --help handling out of SKILL.md into commands/clodex.md so they survive session-cache staleness across upgrades (slash command bodies re-read fresh per invocation; skill content cached at session start). v0.2.8 added automated broker wedge detection + recovery. Paired with HARD_RULES.md v0.2.6 (broker-kill exception). v0.2.7 added iter-NNN-stalled.md breadcrumbs + ~3-min stall detection. v0.2.6 added per-iteration iter-NNN-review.md. v0.2.5 externalized hard rules. v0.2.4 normalized .clodex/ disk layout. v0.2.3 forced help/version through Bash. v0.2.2 added --version flag. v0.2.1 adapted to codex plugin v1.0.4's disable-model-invocation. v0.2 baseline: hard rules, --continue flag, outage-aware retry, 3-failure-mode cap.
